quoteFirst: The victory was specially one of artillery. The first shot was fired at 1.25 p.m., and the last at
quoteLast: Three hundred and sixty-two shells and eighty-six charges of canister were expended. Many acts of gallantry were performed. Colonel Wood, as usual, was pre-eminent.
title: History of the Zulu War
author: Wilmot, Alexander, 1836-1924
